description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open. Using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\', analyze which days of the week have the highest order volume across different months. Create a calculated data element named 'Day of Week' from the 'Order Date' column using a function to extract the day name. Generate a heatmap visualization titled 'Order Volume Heatmap' showing order volume (Count of Order ID or Row Count) by 'Month' (rows) and 'Day of Week' (columns). Save the workbook as 'Seasonality_Analysis'.
